BrowseSearchAbout

Annotation

The smoky candle end of time

R the smoky candle end...

A complex line, which combines Mantegna's image of history as a burning candle, Shelley's image of esthetic perception as a burning coal, and Bleistein's cigar. It marks that stage at which Bleistein achieves the third of Aquinas aesthetic perceptions, which is that of claritas.
